low_consistency.recovery_plan: Start with 1.5 hours daily, set phone reminders

medium_consistency.recovery_plan: Maintain current schedule, add 30-minute daily revision

missed_days_triggers.1-2_days_missed: Spend 45 minutes on revision before new topics
missed_days_triggers.3+_days_missed: Review last week's progress and restart schedule

burnout_recovery.High: Reduce study hours by 30% for 2 days, focus on revision only
burnout_recovery.Medium: Add 15-minute breaks every hour, reduce difficult subjects
